name: Qwest Communications International, Inc.
description: Qwest Communications International, Inc. was a major American telecommunications company that provided voice, data, and video services to customers across the United States. Headquartered in Denver, Colorado, the company grew significantly through various acquisitions, including U S WEST and LCI International. Qwest was a prominent provider of landline phone and internet services before being acquired by CenturyLink in 2011. Following a series of corporate rebrandings and further acquisitions, the entity that was once Qwest is now integrated into Lumen Technologies, a global communications and technology company focused on enterprise networking and cloud solutions.
